document_api_meta.title: Get Shop Products
document_api_meta.env_desc: Developer can utilize this API to search and retrieve products information of shop which is bound by a specific creator with specific keywords.

request_header_param.name: x-tts-access-token
request_header_param.desc: The creator access_token value from [Get Access Token](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a3292b0f40314a92d75#Get%20Access%20Token%20API), when user_type = 1. Follow this [guide](https://partner.tiktokshop.com/docv2/page/678e3a362dccb8030ea6f98c) to get creator access_token.

request_query_param.name: app_key
request_query_param.desc: Every single app will have a unique key. Please use the specific key assigned to your app.

request_query_param.name: sign
request_query_param.desc: Signature generated by gen algorithm. When you send API requests to TTS, you must sign them so that TTS can identify the senders.

request_query_param.name: timestamp
request_query_param.desc: Unix timestamp GMT (UTC+00:00). This timestamp is used across all API requests. Developers can use this convert to local time.

request_query_param.name: title_keyword
request_query_param.desc: The title keyword of the product you wish to search by.

request_query_param.name: sort_field
request_query_param.desc: Sort fields include PRODUCT_ID, PRICE and SALE. If sort_field is empty or invalid, PRODUCT_ID will be set as default.

request_query_param.name: sort_order
request_query_param.desc: Sort orders include DESC and ASC. If sort order is empty or invalid, DESC will be set as default.

request_query_param.name: page_size
request_query_param.desc:
Pagination count determines how many products you'll get after sending the request. 20 is a recommended number.
Valid Range: [1-100]

request_query_param.name: page_token
request_query_param.desc: The pagination offset that determines where you begin your search. If you are making your first request, this will be empty.

response_param.name: code
response_param.desc: The success or failure status code returned in API response.

response_param.name: message
response_param.desc: The success or failure messages returned in API response. Reasons of failure will be described in the message.

response_param.name: ^products
response_param.desc: The searched product list. It will be empty when there are no search results.

response_param.name: ^^price
response_param.desc: Product price shown with two decimal places and currency.

response_param.name: ^^^amount
response_param.desc: Product price with two decimal places.

response_param.name: ^^^currency
response_param.desc: Product price currency, based on region where creators can sell.

response_param.name: ^^added_status
response_param.desc:
Showcase add status with possible values:
- ADDABLE
- ADDED
- REJECTED

response_param.name: ^^brand_name
response_param.desc: The brand name a seller has set for a product.

response_param.name: ^^^url
response_param.desc: The URL of the product image.

response_param.name: ^^^width
response_param.desc: The width of the product image.

response_param.name: ^^^height
response_param.desc: The height of the product image.

response_param.name: ^^sales_count
response_param.desc: The number of products that have been sold.

response_param.name: ^total_count
response_param.desc: The total number of products that meet the query conditions.

response_param.name: ^next_page_token
response_param.desc: The pagination token is a cursor used for pagination. The token is returned in the previous pagination query to determine the current position. It will be empty when there aren't any products to search for.

sample_code.label: Go
Node.js
Java

scope_list.package_description: You will be able to post shoppable content to the creator's TikTok account. If this content violates any TikTok Shop terms or policies, TikTok Shop may take enforcement action against the creator's account or the content.
scope_list.auth_info: The developer will be able to post shoppable content to your TikTok account. If this content violates any TikTok Shop terms or policies, TikTok Shop may take enforcement action against your account or the content.
